pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly instructs changing the nickname to 'AlexC' and verifier scripts enforce this exact string.
setup_task.sh injects this exact initial value via `gsettings set org.sugarlabs.user nick 'Learner'`.
setup_task.sh injects this exact initial value via `gsettings set org.sugarlabs.user color '#FF2B34,#005FE4'`.
task.json description instructs saving the Write document with the title 'Student Setup Log' and export_result.sh explicitly greps the Sugar Journal for this title.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically initialized Sugar desktop user profile. It has been verified that setup_task.sh explicitly resets the initial nickname to 'Learner' and the XO color to '#FF2B34,#005FE4' via gsettings. Furthermore, the expected target nickname ('AlexC') and journal title ('Student Setup Log') match both the explicit task instructions and the verification checks in export_result.sh.
